race.comment: HE'S GODSPEED (2) back in grade and will find this more to his liking. Covered ground in the run with a plugging seventh over 1350m at Wyong in BM64 class. No surprise to see him return to winning form. KING SOLEIL (4) dropped in weight and showed good early speed for a well-deserved win over 1405m at Tuncurry. Confidence is high and don't dismiss. DEEP DRIVE (3) struggled to run the 2018m out when she folded up in the straight to finish sixth on May 12. Can sneak into the placings back to the 1600m. CLASS REVOLUTION (5) returns from a 30 day let-up and proven in the conditions. Had plenty in hand when saluting at Kempsey over 1900m in BM50 class on the heavy (10) track. Keep safe in this strong race.
